title: CI: pin pnpm version and flip ui job to blocking
description:
The new ci.yml ui job fails at setup: pnpm/action-setup@v4 errors with "No pnpm version is specified". Fix: add "packageManager": "pnpm@<version matching local, currently 11.0.6>" to internal/tickboard/ui/package.json (preferred over hardcoding in the workflow — pins for humans too). Then, since the comms and dialog ticks have made pnpm test green by default, REMOVE continue-on-error: true from the ui job in .github/workflows/ci.yml (and its baseline comment) so UI tests become blocking. Also address the deprecation annotation: check for a newer pnpm/action-setup major; if none supports Node 24 yet, set FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true env on the job per the GitHub deprecation notice.

Files: internal/tickboard/ui/package.json, .github/workflows/ci.yml.
Verify locally: cd internal/tickboard/ui && pnpm install && pnpm test (still green with the packageManager pin).
acceptance_criteria: package.json has packageManager pin; ci.yml ui job is blocking with no continue-on-error; local pnpm install+test green
